subtitleNullable: Adaptive ML-Based Signal Features for Real-Time UAV Identification
descriptionNullable:
The UAV Encrypted Communication Monitoring Dataset is designed for real-time UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) identification through encrypted signal analysis. It contains simulated encrypted communication signals, including key features such as signal strength, frequency, modulation type, encryption protocol, and entropy, which are essential for monitoring UAV activity in secured communication channels.


Key Features:
2,000 encrypted signal instances with UAV and non-UAV labels.
Wavelet denoising applied to filter noise from raw signals.
Feature extraction using PCA for dimensionality reduction.
Binary classification labels (1 = UAV detected, 0 = Non-UAV signal).
Normalized features for better machine learning model training.
Potential Applications:
Cybersecurity & Threat Detection: Identifying UAVs communicating over encrypted channels.
Defense & Surveillance: Monitoring unauthorized UAV activity in restricted areas.
AI-Based Signal Processing: Training ML models for adaptive encrypted signal analysis.
File Format:
CSV (Comma-Separated Values)
